zh.lifeSummary: 當Kt Sir John Burton於1385年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，他的父親Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor17歲，母親Lady Nancy Cranton20歲。他於1400年與Florence Darell Chichley在英國肯特普雷斯頓-可吉法維沙安結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年2月2日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kt Sir John Burton于1385年出生在英国英格兰素可时，他的父亲Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor17岁，母亲Lady Nancy Cranton20岁。他于1400年与Florence Darell Chichley在英国肯特普雷斯頓-可吉法維沙安结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1457年2月2日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Kt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Kt Sir John Burton was born in 1385, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor, was 17 and his mother, Lady Nancy Cranton, was 20. He married Florence Darell Chichley in 1400, in Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 2 February 1457, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kt Sir John Burton est né en 1385, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Nancy Cranton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Florence Darell Chichley en 1400, à Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 février 1457, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kt Sir John Burton 1385 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor 17 und seine Mutter Lady Nancy Cranton 20. Er hat 1400 in Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England Florence Darell Chichley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1457 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kt Sir John Burton è nato il nel 1385 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Nancy Cranton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Florence Darell Chichley nel 1400, nel Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1457, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kt Sir John Burtonが1385年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnorは17歳，母Lady Nancy Crantonは20歳であった。1400年にイギリスケントプレストン-ネクスト-ファバーシャムでFlorence Darell Chichleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1457年2月2日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kt Sir John Burton(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Nancy Cranton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 켄트 프레스토-니스트-파버샤에서 Florence Darell Chichley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 2월 2일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kt Sir John Burton nasceu em 1385, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Nancy Cranton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Florence Darell Chichley em 1400, em Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1457, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kt Sir John Burton родился в 1385 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Nancy Cranton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence Darell Chichley в 1400 г. в местности престон-некст-фавиршам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 2 февраля 1457 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kt Sir John Burton nació en 1385, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Walter Knight Burton of Longnor, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lady Nancy Cranton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Florence Darell Chichley en 1400, en Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1457, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
